entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop whose stover quality is being evaluated for livestock productivity

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: OMD, a measure of the digestibility of organic matter in stover

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER INTAKE
entities.description: OMI, the amount of organic matter consumed by livestock

entities.name: DIGESTIBLE ORGANIC MATTER INTAKE
entities.description: DOMI, the product of organic matter digestibility and organic matter intake

entities.name: NITROGEN BALANCE
entities.description: The accretion or loss of nitrogen in livestock fed on stover

entities.name: LIVESTOCK PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The potential of crop stover to support livestock growth and health

entities.name: SHEEP
entities.description: The livestock animal used to evaluate the productivity potential of pearl millet stover

entities.name: SOIL CONDITION
entities.description: The type of soil in which the crop is grown, affecting stover quality

entities.name: BLACK SOIL
entities.description: A specific type of soil condition used in the study

entities.name: RED SOIL
entities.description: A specific type of soil condition used in the study

entities.name: STAGE OF HARVEST
entities.description: The maturity level of the crop at the time of harvest

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL MATURITY
entities.description: A specific stage of harvest

entities.name: FULL MATURITY
entities.description: A specific stage of harvest

entities.name: HIGH GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A characteristic of specific experimental pearl millet varieties

entities.name: HIGH STOVER DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: A characteristic of specific experimental pearl millet varieties

entities.name: HIGH STOVER NITROGEN
entities.description: A characteristic of specific experimental pearl millet varieties

entities.name: DUAL PURPOSE
entities.description: A characteristic of specific experimental pearl millet varieties designed for both grain and fodder

entities.name: RECURRENT SELECTIONS
entities.description: A breeding method used to develop pearl millet cultivars

entities.name: STEPWISE MULTIPLE REGRESSION
entities.description: A statistical procedure used to predict OMI, DOMI, and nitrogen balance

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Physical measurements of the crop used to predict livestock productivity

entities.name: CHEMICAL MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Chemical analysis of the crop used to predict livestock productivity

entities.name: IN VITRO MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Laboratory-based measurements of stover quality used to predict livestock productivity

entities.name: ICMV 221
entities.description: A specific cultivar of pearl millet used in the study
